text.title: Late-Invoice Dunning Sequence Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Late-Invoice Dunning Sequence output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: sequence has no day-21 OR day-30 step

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: sequence populated with a typed value
templates populated with a typed value
late_fee populated with a typed value
work_stoppage populated with a typed value
collections_gate populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
